name: Ultimate Masters

draft.notes: Every pack contains a foil card (ad card + foil + rare + 3 uncommons + 10 commons). Mythics replace rare ~1/8. Empirical foil rarity over 32 boxes: 549 common, 161 uncommon, 52 rare, 6 mythic.

statedRates: Mythic replaces rare ~1/8. Empirical foil distribution (32 boxes): 549 common, 161 uncommon, 52 rare, 6 mythic.
sourceNotes: Masters reprint set; has 20 mythics (5 extra vs normal large set). Printed in Japan, 112-card sheets, front-facing. 24 packs per box. Ad card carries a token on its front.
